overview.description: Digital transformation consulting and implementation partner leveraging AI, data, and enterprise technology
overview.description_long: ACTUM Digital is one of Europe's largest independent digital agencies, delivering end-to-end services for managing experiences, commerce, business processes, content and data at scale. Founded in 1996, the company combines AI implementation, digital commerce, experience design, and data transformation across energy, e-commerce, manufacturing, and finance sectors. Partners with Sitecore, Kentico, Microsoft, Salesforce, SAP, Adobe, BigCommerce, AWS, and more. Their 'AI Monstera' initiative delivers AI insights and use cases to business audiences.
overview.tagline: Your digital future. Powered by AI

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 1996 as a digital agency; grown over 29 years into one of Europe's largest independent digital agencies with offices across Europe and India

key_milestones.event: Launched AI Monstera, an AI insights initiative for business
Reported €31M revenue and 500+ professionals across 7 offices

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: As a consulting and implementation partner, Actum's core value is delivery expertise, change management, and multi-vendor integration — not proprietary AI IP. AI-assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, etc.) could reduce headcount in delivery roles over time, but deep client relationships and complex multi-system integrations provide a meaningful moat.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Digital transformation consulting is a large, established and growing market with strong enterprise demand. Actum has 100+ enterprise clients including Christie's, METRO AG, and UniCredit, and €31M annual revenue, demonstrating clear product-market fit.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Bootstrapped and profitable since 1996 with €31M in revenue and 7 offices; no dependency on VC funding or external capital for operations.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A 29-year-old independent digital agency with €31M revenue, 500+ professionals, established enterprise client base, and deep multi-vendor technology partnerships has a strong, resilient business model. Near-term AI disruption risk is mitigated by client lock-in and service breadth.

metadata.notes: Leadership first names visible on website but surnames not scraped. Revenue of €31M stated on homepage. LinkedIn shows ~259 employees but company states '500+ professionals' which may include contractors across 7 offices.
